promotion_target: promote beam from hint-guided preview to verified preview

recommendation.summary: Not enough evidence today to promote beam from hint-guided preview to verified preview.

positive_evidence: The parser recognizes an MCVL container and extracts a stable 20-entry table directory with NODE and ELEM rows present.
The decoder already derives NODE/ELEM hint ranges: NODE 951..1111 (160 records), ELEM 224..379 (155 records), stride 32 bytes.
A repeatable hint preview exists and is surfaced end-to-end in the viewer as a 5-point / 4-segment candidate.
Refresh artifacts consistently rank the beam source at hint-preview quality and keep the selection deterministic.

blocking_evidence.blocker: No verified geometry preview is produced by the decoder today.
NODE records do not justify exact xyz recovery yet.
blocking_evidence.evidence: mcvl_node_record_probe shows 146/160 records with 0 plausible values, 13 with 1 value, 1 with 2 values, and 0 with 3+ values; the report note explicitly says exact xyz decode is not justified yet.

blocking_evidence.blocker: ELEM connectivity is not trustworthy yet.
blocking_evidence.evidence: beam_decoded_preview_baseline.json says: "ELEM range still looks constant-filled, so connectivity decode is not trustworthy yet."

blocking_evidence.blocker: Parser contract still treats MCVL as directory inventory only, not payload-exact topology.
blocking_evidence.evidence: decode_meb_inventory() emits PASS_TABLE_DIRECTORY_ONLY unless geometry_preview_ready becomes true; next_step notes still say to use MCVL inventory as a bridge until full NODE/ELEM payload mapping is implemented.

blocking_evidence.blocker: Archive-level adapter readiness is still below exact decode confidence.
blocking_evidence.evidence: adapter_manifest.json and primary_member_probe.json both keep the primary .mcb probe at probe_ready=false / table layout still uncertain.

exact_blockers: Recover record-local NODE xyz, not just sparse scalar lanes or packed-pair hints.
Decode trustworthy ELEM member references from the hinted range instead of the current constant-filled-looking uint layout.
Produce a parser-level exact/topology-grounded preview artifact with geometry_preview_ready=true.
Lift beam cross-check from weak silhouette match to evidence strong enough for verified preview gating.
Update adapter/probe readiness from table-layout-uncertain to an exact-decode-capable state.

why_not: No parser-level verified or exact topology preview artifact exists for beam.
NODE xyz evidence is sparse and underdetermined.
ELEM connectivity evidence is explicitly flagged as untrustworthy.
Viewer cross-check remains weak rather than strong.

next_recommended_work: Investigate record-local NODE payload semantics for the 951..1111 range and identify whether xyz are split across slots/records.
Reverse the ELEM 224..379 uint layout enough to prove stable node-to-member references.
Only after those two land, re-run decode and require geometry_preview_ready=true before considering verified preview promotion.
